What's Included?

What's Included in Tashora?

Tashora is built to take your brand from zero to a consistently performing influencer campaign. You're not just getting creators — you're getting the systems, contracts, and community support that let you execute without second-guessing.

Module 1
Creator Sourcing & Vetting
We discover and vet micro and nano influencers in the UAE health, beauty, and lifestyle space. Every creator is screened for engagement authenticity, content quality, niche relevance, and UAE licensing compliance before we ever present them to you.
Module 2
Campaign Strategy & Brief
A professional campaign brief is crafted for every project — clear objectives, content formats, timelines, and brand guidelines all in one document so every creator knows exactly what to deliver.
Module 3
Contract-Backed Agreements
Every partnership is covered by legally structured agreements protecting both brand and creator. Clear deliverables, payment terms, revision rights, and usage clauses — no handshake deals, no surprises.
Module 4
Content Review & Approvals
You approve every piece of content before it goes live. Full visibility and control at every stage — we manage the creator communication so you don't have to chase anyone.
Module 5
Campaign Launch & Management
We coordinate go-live timing, monitor performance in real time, and handle any creator issues that arise mid-campaign — so you can focus on your business, not your inbox.
Module 6
Performance Reporting
At campaign close you receive a detailed performance report covering reach, impressions, engagement, and key outcomes. Every number is documented so you always know your ROI and what to improve next time.
What's Included?

What You Get

Each deliverable comes with clear action items so you're always executing, not just waiting.

1
Full Campaign Management

Step-by-step execution from brief creation to post-campaign report. We handle creator outreach, negotiation, contracts, content review, and go-live coordination — everything end to end.

2
Creator Resource Library

Done-for-you resources including outreach scripts, influencer agreements, campaign trackers, brief templates, and negotiation frameworks. Everything battle-tested and ready to deploy immediately.

3
Ongoing Campaign Support

Direct access to our team throughout the campaign, with real-time feedback on content, creator issues, and performance. Everything you need for accountability, execution, and results.

Meet Zaheer

Zaheer — Founder of Tashora

From a background in analytical chemistry to building a UAE influencer marketing agency from scratch — Zaheer has built Tashora with a uniquely rigorous, science-minded approach to creator vetting and campaign execution. In a space flooded with agencies promising big numbers, Tashora is built on precision, contracts, and transparency.

He is the founder of Tashora, a boutique influencer marketing agency based in Mohammed Bin Zayed City, Abu Dhabi, UAE — specialising in health and beauty brands and the creators who serve them.

When you work with Tashora, you're working directly with someone who understands both the science behind beauty products and the systems behind successful influencer campaigns — a rare combination in this market.

Why Brands Choose Tashora

Contract-backed. Creator-vetted. Transparent from day one.

  • ✦ Contract-backed campaigns — legally protected from brief to delivery
  • ✦ Carefully sourced creators matched to your brand and audience
  • ✦ Transparent communication at every stage of the campaign

How It Works

01
Campaign Brief
You fill out our brand questionnaire. We build your full campaign brief — objectives, formats, timelines, creator criteria.
02
Creator Selection
We source and vet creators that match your niche, audience, and campaign goals. You review and approve the final list.
03
Contracts & Outreach
We handle all creator outreach, negotiations, and sign legally binding influencer agreements on your behalf.
04
Content Approval
Every piece of content goes through your approval before going live. You have full control — we handle all the back and forth.
05
Campaign Launch
Creators go live on the agreed dates. We monitor the campaign and handle any issues in real time.
06
Reporting
We deliver a full performance report — reach, engagement, outcomes, and next-step recommendations.

Frequently Asked Questions

What niches does Tashora specialise in?+
We specialise in health, beauty, and lifestyle — with a strong focus on the UAE market including the expat community. Our founder's analytical chemistry background gives us a uniquely rigorous edge in the skincare and beauty space.
Do I need prior experience with influencer marketing?+
Not at all. Tashora handles everything — from creator sourcing to final reporting. You simply brief us on your goals and approve the content. We handle the rest end to end.
How are creators vetted?+
We assess engagement rate, audience authenticity, niche relevance, content quality, and professionalism before recommending any creator. We also screen for UAE licensing compliance where applicable.
What does "contract-backed" mean?+
Every campaign is covered by a formal influencer agreement and a brand client contract. Deliverables, timelines, payment terms, and usage rights are all legally documented — protecting you on both sides of the deal.
How much time do I need to commit each week?+
Minimal. After the initial brief, your main role is to review and approve content. We manage all creator communication, scheduling, and campaign coordination so your time commitment is kept to a minimum.
How do I get started?+
Click "Launch a Campaign" and fill out our quick brand questionnaire. We'll reach out within 48 hours to schedule a strategy call and get your campaign moving.
